𝗘𝗦𝗣𝟯𝟮-𝗕𝗜𝗧-𝗣𝗜𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗘 | Hardware hacking and digital protocol analysis  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Hardware hacking and digital protocol analysis
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Interactive CLI via USB Serial or WiFi Web
✅ Support for numerous protocols (I2C, SPI, UART, 1-Wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, RFID, etc.)
✅ Protocol sniffers for I2C, UART, SPI, 1Wire, 2wire, CAN, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, SubGhz
✅ EEPROM dump tools
✅ Scripting using Bus Pirate-style commands
✅ Baudrate auto-detection
✅ AT commands support


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🍴 309 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ESP32 Bit Pirate is an open-source firmware that transforms an ESP32 device into a versatile hardware hacking tool. It supports a wide array of digital and radio protocols, offering features like sniffing, sending, scripting, and interactive control via a web-based CLI.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗔𝗣𝗣-𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗥𝗘-𝗦𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗘𝗡𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗦 | Automating the creation of professional, marketing-ready App Store and Google Play screenshots using AI.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the creation of professional, marketing-ready App Store and Google Play screenshots using AI.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered screenshot generation for App Store and Google Play
✅ Connected canvas editor for seamless element spanning
✅ Real device frames for iOS, iPad, Android, and Play Store formats
✅ Inspector controls for editing layout, labels, and transforms
✅ Persistent project state with autosave to disk and localStorage
✅ One-click export bundles at store-ready sizes
✅ Support for locales, RTL-aware copy, and reusable themes
✅ Integration with AI coding agents via `npx skills`


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 412 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a Next.js-based editor for generating App Store and Google Play marketing screenshots. It leverages AI coding agents to automate the creation of visually appealing and store-ready screenshot decks, complete with device frames, captions, and connected canvas layouts.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧 | To provide a flexible and scalable software agent for managing and processing video streams from various camera sources for surveillance purposes.  📈 Growing!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a flexible and scalable software agent for managing and processing video streams from various camera sources for surveillance purposes.
📅 Created: Aug 2020 • Updated: Jun 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source video surveillance management agent
✅ Scalable and isolated component of the Kerberos.io stack
✅ Supports IP cameras with RTSP H264/H265 streams
✅ Can process streams from USB cameras, Raspberry Pi cameras, etc. (via camera-to-rtsp)
✅ Runs on various hardware architectures (ARM, AMD64) and environments (Raspberry Pi, NUC, VM, Kubernetes)
✅ MIT License, allowing for commercial use
✅ Integrates with the broader Kerberos.io ecosystem


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 149 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 62 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The Kerberos Agent is an open-source, scalable video surveillance management system designed for IP cameras and other video sources. It allows for the processing and management of video streams, enabling features like motion detection and integration into larger surveillance setups.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✅ AI-summarized web search results

✅ Privacy-first design
✅ Themeable interface

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MATRIXON Agentic Browser is an open-source, privacy-focused desktop browser built with Electron. It integrates a fully local AI assistant powered by llama.cpp and GGUF models, enabling smart web automation and interaction without relying on cloud services or API keys.

✅ Real-time CPU and RAM usage monitoring

Cobalt is a self-hosted web dashboard designed for easily creating and managing game servers on your own VPS. It offers a user-friendly interface for server setup, command execution, resource monitoring, and user access control, making it a cost-effective alternative to specialized hosting platforms.

This Python Telegram bot allows users to receive anonymous messages via a unique personal link, with features for replying, blocking senders, and an optional premium system to reveal sender identities. It also includes an admin panel for bot management.
